creator: slogster@gmail.com
text:
I`ve asked about the same problem on questions@ and got pointed to a thread 
http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-x11/2007-June/004649.html on x11 
relating to this issue. From the thread it seems to be a problem of the 
x11/libX11 port, not gimp. There is a patch in that email for the port, I 
haven`t tried that yet. I will report back when I test it.
